What this is

A funnel that delivers
pre-sold homeowners.

Most roofing lead generation means racing to call a shared lead before three other contractors do. The prospect has no loyalty, no trust, and no idea who you are. You win on price or you don't win at all.

This system is different. It runs a Meta ad to a VSL that does the trust transfer before anyone picks up the phone. By the time a homeowner submits the form, they already know who you are, what you stand for, and why you're worth the premium.

How it works

Four steps.
End to end.

Step 01

The Ad

A Meta carousel ad built around a single avatar — the established homeowner with a 15+ year old roof who wants one contractor they can trust completely. The creative filters the wrong prospect out before they ever tap the button.

Step 02

The VSL

A 5-minute video of you on camera — no actors, no voiceover. It names the 3-quote problem, establishes your credibility, and transfers trust before the homeowner ever meets you. Filmed once. Runs indefinitely.

Step 03

The Form

A simple qualifying form — roof age, home value, best time to call. The wrong prospect self-selects out. You only see homeowners who match the avatar: established neighborhoods, older roofs, premium homes.

Step 04

The Assessment

Your team shows up to a homeowner who already knows you, trusts you, and has seen your story. The assessment closes naturally. You're not competing with two other contractors — you're confirming what they already decided.

Who this is for

Built for one kind
of roofing contractor.

You have a proven track record and real customer testimonials. This funnel amplifies trust — it doesn't manufacture it.

You serve established residential neighborhoods with homes in the $400k+ range. You're not chasing storm chasers or racing to the lowest bid.

You have enough business right now but want a consistent, predictable pipeline that doesn't depend on referrals or word of mouth alone.

You want a system that produces no extra work for your team beyond the normal estimate and close process.

The guarantee.
No fine print.

If the funnel doesn’t generate at least 3x your total investment in closed jobs within 90 days, I keep working at no additional charge until it does.

$2,000 / month  ·  3-month minimum
